setPassword.title: Set a password
setPassword.subtitle: You signed in with a third-party account, so it has no password yet. Set one now to secure your account — you'll need it to change settings or sign in directly.
setPassword.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
setPassword.failed: Couldn't set your password. Please try again.

ready.title: You're all set
ready.body: Aurelia is tuned to your taste. Start your first conversation whenever you're ready.

intro.title: A calmer place to think.
intro.subtitle: Take a few seconds to make Aurelia yours. You can change any of this later in Settings.

points.own: Your conversation — you stay in control

config.title: Make it yours
config.subtitle: Set a few preferences, or skip and dive straight in.

fields.chatStyleBody: How detailed should answers be by default?
fields.memoryBody: Let Aurelia remember useful details across your chats.

stepHints.theme: Light, dark, or follow your system.
